features: Versatile Design Options: Unleash creativity with our craft kits for kids! Featuring six unique animal pattern papers and reusable adhesive, this set offers endless possibilities for arts and crafts for kids ages 3-8. Whether it’s pompoms for crafting or custom designs, the fun never stops.

Boosts Skills & Coordination: More than just a kids’ craft kit, the YPLUS set is an educational adventure. It enhances hand-eye coordination, sharpens cognitive abilities, and sparks mental growth—perfect for arts and crafts for kids ages 5-6 or even younger learners at age 3.

Colourful Pompoms Galore: Packed with assorted pom poms in vibrant hues, this kids craft set lets children follow guided patterns or invent their own masterpieces. From pom poms craft projects to unique artwork, imagination takes the lead!

Hours of Creative Fun: Keep little hands busy with crafts for kids that entertain for hours. Ideal for decorating rooms, school projects, or simply enjoying arts and crafts for kids age 4-6, this set ensures endless engagement and joyful learning.

Perfect Gift for All Ages: Whether it’s arts and crafts for kids age 8 or a starter kit for ages 3-5, this craft kits for kids 4-6 set is a delightful present. With pompoms for crafting and easy-to-use materials, it’s a hit for every young artist!
description: From the brand Make Every Kid An Artist Previous page Peanut Crayons Peanut-shaped children's crayons, easy to grip, and with a no-mess formula that puts parents at ease about dirty stains. Water Paint Book Embedded with brushes, paints, and patterns, requiring only water to create, allowing children to enjoy painting anytime, anywhere. Geometry Set A set that includes rulers, protractors, compasses, pencils,etc, meets the daily needs of students and mathematics enthusiasts. Automatic Sharpener USB rechargeable fully automatic pencil sharpener, suitable for various sizes of pencils, freeing your hands. Eraser Line Peanut-shaped erasers that automatically roll up debris into a line, keeping the paper surface clean. Acrylic Markers Versatile acrylic markers for vibrant art on any surface, perfect for both beginners and professionals. Doodle Mat Large water doodle mat for endless, mess-free fun for kids, encouraging creativity and easy cleanup. Safety Scissors Safety scissors with an adjustable blade for precise cutting, ensuring safety and versatility for various projects. Paint Sticks Quick-drying paint sticks for vibrant, smudge-free artwork, ideal for quick projects and on-the-go creativity. Water Reveal Books Water-revealing magic sketchbook for creative and clean drawing, bringing out the artist in every child with a splash of water. Watercolour Books Portable watercolor set to inspire artistic moments anywhere, compact and convenient for travel or outdoor painting. Next page
